texto: It is humor's job to laugh at the futility oft engendered by the improbable
autor: but it is poetry's job to dream of the potentiality of that which is not impossible.
explicacao: Citação de but it is poetry's job to dream of the potentiality of that which is not impossible. sobre temas ligados a humor. “It is humor's job to laugh at the futility oft engendered by the improbable” articula humor, d-e-navarro, reflexao em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
